prompt: Analyze the uploaded X (Twitter) profile screenshot. First, extract my profile picture, display name, and bio text. Then, based on my bio and overall vibe, generate a realistic Japanese TV breaking news broadcast screen image featuring me. The character should closely resemble the person in the profile picture, shown as if being interviewed live on camera. Design it to look like a Japanese news program (similar to NHK News or News Zero style). All text must be in Japanese. Include the following elements: 1. A red "速報" banner at the top of the screen. 2. A large headline in Japanese summarizing who I am based on my bio (e.g., "AI時代の案内人 ○○氏 独占取材"). 3. A profile data box on the side of the screen (like Japanese news info panels) containing: - "人物像" section: 3 short bullet points about my personality or profession based on my bio - "注目ポイント" section: 3 small items representing my interests or skills inferred from my profile 4. A news ticker at the bottom with 2-3 humorous short updates derived from my bio and interests, written in Japanese. 5. A fictional Japanese news channel logo in the corner (e.g., "プロフィールTV" or "X速報チャンネル"). 6. A "生中継" or "LIVE" indicator in red in the upper corner. The overall look should be a photorealistic Japanese TV news broadcast screen with clean, modern Japanese typography. Ensure all Japanese text is perfectly legible and accurately reflects my profile information.
